channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: AI vs nukes
item.description: 10 obvious reasons that the danger from AGI is way more serious than nuclear weapons: Nuclear weapons are not smarter than humanity. Nuclear weapons are not self-replicating. Nuclear weapons are not self-improving. Scientists understand how nuclear weapons work. You can calculate how powerful a nuclear weapon will be before setting it off. A realistic full exchange between two nuclear powers wouldn’t extinguish literally all of humanity. It would be hard to do a full nuclear exchange by accident and without any human being having decided to do that.
